channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV] Anime News Network cocoon Wartime 动画 Streams English-Subtitled 预告PV
item.description: GKIDS screens anime in N. American theaters on September 4 ― GKIDS began streaming on Thursday an English-subtitled trailer for cocoon – One Summer of Girlhood (cocoon Aru Natsu no Shōjo-tachi Yori),... | 来源: ANN | 原文: cocoon Wartime Anime Streams English-Subtitled Trailer

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network MediaOCD Adds Kiss×sis, Monster Rancher, Sonic X 动画, More Titles Discotek Deep Dives Project
item.description: Also: Mazinger Z, Marmalade Boy, Ultimate Muscle, more ― MediaOCD announced on Wednesday the new round of titles that it is adding to its store as part of the Discotek Deep Dives initiative.The... | 来源: ANN | 原文: MediaOCD Adds Kiss×sis, Monster Rancher, Sonic X Anime, More Titles to Discotek Deep Dives Project

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network AnimeJapan 2027 Takes Place on March 26-28, 1 Business Day Public Day Overlapping
item.description: Event at Intex Osaka will also hold 1st business day before public days for 1st time since 2018 ― The staff for the AnimeJapan convention announced on Wednesday that the next year's event, which will... | 来源: ANN | 原文: AnimeJapan 2027 Takes Place on March 26-28, With 1 Business Day and Public Day Overlapping

item.title: [PV][CAST][STAFF][公开] MyAnimeList Kaketa Tsuki no Mercedes 公开 Lead 声优阵容, Main 制作阵容, 第一 宣传视频 Winter 2027
item.description: Entertainment company Hakuhodo DY Music & Pictures opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Firehead's Kaketa Tsuki no Mercedes: Kyuuketsuki no Kizoku ni Tensei shita kedo... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Kaketa Tsuki no Mercedes' Reveals Lead Cast, Main Staff, First Promo for Winter 2027

item.title: [CAST] MyAnimeList 追加 声优阵容 Pair Junket Bank Announced
item.description: The official website of the television anime adaptation of Ikkou Tanaka's Junket Bank manga announced an additional pair of cast on Wednesday. The anime is scheduled to premiere on TV Tokyo... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Additional Cast Pair for 'Junket Bank' Announced

item.title: [动画][CAST][发表] MyAnimeList 新作 Ghost Shell TV 动画 宣布 Main 声优阵容
item.description: The official website for the new Koukaku Kidoutai (The Ghost in the Shell) television anime announced the main cast on Tuesday. The new TV anime premiered on Tuesday at 11:00 p.m. on Kansai TV and... | 来源: MAL | 原文: New 'Ghost in the Shell' TV Anime Announces Main Cast

item.title: [CAST][STAFF][开播][发表] MyAnimeList Ma no Mono-tachi wa Kuwadateru 宣布 Main 声优阵容, 追加 制作阵容, 2027 开播
